title: Growth Energy Applauds Senate Push for Consumer Access to E15
content: Growth Energy, the nationâ€™s largest biofuel trade group, welcomed a bipartisan letter from 17 U.S. senators urging swift action on a summer waiver for E15 fuel. Led by Senators John Thune and Dick Durbin, the letter emphasized that uninterrupted access to the 15% ethanol blendâ€”usable in 96% of todayâ€™s carsâ€”would lower fuel prices, boost American energy supply, and support farmers. Growth Energy CEO Emily Skor highlighted that E15 has saved drivers 10â€“30 cents per gallon in past summers and called for urgent action to protect these savings and strengthen the rural economy.
author: Analysts Account
